replies.msg:
Guinea Govt Arrests All Chinese Until Guineans Return from China safely (video)

http://gnnliberia.com/2020/04/18/guinea-govt-arrests-all-chinese-until-guineans-return-from-china-safely-video/

Following the Maltreatment of Blacks in China by Chinese officials, A video Trending online purportedly shows the Moment Guinea Government arrested all Chinese Nationals in their country until all Guineans in China return safely.

Recall that Chinese officials threw Blacks out of their homes. Also Read: You cannot tell me what to do in my state – Wike blasts Buhari (video) A social media user shared the video online, wrote; “Guinea government took a decisive measure, seized all Chinese national till all her citizens return safely. “It is only a government who does not collect bribe can stand on their feet for such action”.
